articles.headline: How USMNT, USWNT choose opponents, venues and prices for games
articles.description: USMNT and USWNT fans often complain about high ticket prices, repetitive cities and weak opponents for games, but U.S. Soccer explains everything that goes into such decisions.

keyEvents.text: Goal!  Belize 0, Bermuda 1. Kane Crichlow (Bermuda) right footed shot from outside the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Ne-Jai Tucker.
Luke Robinson (Bermuda) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Bermuda. Lejaun Simmons replaces Liam Evans.
Substitution, Belize. Horace Ávila replaces Eldon Reneau.
Substitution, Belize. Warren Moss replaces Jordy Polanco.
Substitution, Belize. Gilroy Thurton replaces Michael Salazar.
